nodes.label: AI as delegable tool for mundane, standardisable tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as requiring collaboration for non-standard tasks
nodes.grounding_span: if something is mundane, standardisable, repeatable I will delegate it

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner for creative and strategic tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as fully autonomous without human input
nodes.grounding_span: I also may need to collaborate on tasks such as drafting for content, copy, visual generations as these require back and forth

nodes.label: AI pragmatism and directness
nodes.grounding_span: generic phrase usage by llms and their desire to be overly friendly and over affirming of ideas etc and hesitation to be extremely pragmatic

nodes.label: Human-only communication for rapport building
nodes.grounding_span: I like to keep a certain level of communication strictly human input only

nodes.label: Efficiency and optimisation
nodes.grounding_span: a desire for optimisation and efficiency

nodes.label: Personal autonomy and control
nodes.grounding_span: the majority of the fundamentals or criteria to be judged were defined by myself

nodes.label: Authentic human connection
nodes.grounding_span: Getting to build rapport with clients and potential clients is rewarding

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI automation saving time
nodes.grounding_span: The first business report that was created by the agent I made has got to be the most rewarding

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's generic and overly friendly tone
nodes.grounding_span: generic phrase usage by llms and their desire to be overly friendly and over affirming of ideas

nodes.label: Preference for human-only communication in client relationships
nodes.grounding_span: I like to keep a certain level of communication strictly human input only

nodes.label: Optimistic anticipation of increased AI usage with advancement
nodes.grounding_span: if there are leaps in advancement I only see my usage going up

nodes.label: Strategic task decomposition — delegates vs collaborates based on task nature
nodes.grounding_span: if something is mundane, standardisable, repeatable I will delegate it

nodes.label: Opportunity-oriented reframing — sees AI as enabler for new products
nodes.grounding_span: you are now in the position to create systems or products to make that said area more accessible
